    select
        ee1_0.id,
        ee1_0.attempt_count,
        ee1_0.email,
        ee1_0.event_type,
        ee1_0.html_content,
        ee1_0.max_attempts,
        ee1_0.next_retry_at,
        ee1_0.occurred_at,
        ee1_0.processed_at,
        ee1_0.reason,
        ee1_0.status,
        ee1_0.subject,
        ee1_0.updated_at 
    from
        email_events ee1_0 
    where
        ee1_0.status=? 
        and ee1_0.next_retry_at<=? 
    order by
        ee1_0.occurred_at 
    fetch
        first ? rows only","logger_name":"org.hibernate.SQL","thread_name":"scheduler-2","level":"DEBUG","level_value":10000}
